place: Laem Sor, Na Mueang, South Coast, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Seven-Bedroom Beachfront Villa with Infinity Pool
note: Fully staffed · villa manager · private chef · daily breakfast
blurb: A low-slung beachfront villa on Koh Samui's quiet southern shore at Laem Sor, set among coconut plantations with the sand a few steps from the garden. A two-storey main house of open, air-conditioned living spaces gives onto a lawn that runs down to a 7.5 m infinity pool, a poolside sala and two separate pavilions of en-suite bedrooms. Seven bedrooms in all — six kings and a twin — sleeping up to fourteen, and bookable as a three, five or seven-bedroom house. Fully staffed, with sea views over the Gulf and kayaks on the beach.
detail:
This beachfront villa sits on Koh Samui's calm southern coast at Laem Sor, screened by coconut plantations and opening straight onto a quiet stretch of sand. The setting is low and green, the outlook filled by the garden, the pool and the Gulf of Thailand beyond, with almost nothing between the terrace and the water.

The two-storey main house holds the living heart of the villa — an open, air-conditioned living and dining room, a well-equipped kitchen and a TV lounge, with three of the bedrooms arranged above and around it. Wide doors and shaded porches keep the interior and the garden reading as a single space, cooled by the sea breeze.

Beyond the house, a lawn runs down toward the beach past a 7.5 m infinity pool edged with sunloungers. A poolside sala and several outdoor dining and seating areas make room for long lunches and slow evenings, with a barbecue for cooking by the water and kayaks for the calm sea out front.

Across the garden, two further pavilions hold the remaining en-suite bedrooms, giving couples and families their own quiet corners away from the main house. There are seven bedrooms in total — six with king beds and one twin room — sleeping up to fourteen guests, and the villa can be taken as a three, five or seven-bedroom house to suit smaller groups.

The villa comes fully staffed. A villa manager and housekeeping team look after the house, a private chef prepares meals through the day and a daily breakfast is included, with airport transfers arranged on arrival. Laem Sor's temple, beaches and coconut groves are on the doorstep, with the restaurants and marinas of the south coast a short drive away.

features.l: Absolute beachfront with direct beach access
7.5 m infinity pool with poolside sala
Sea views across the Gulf of Thailand
